faqs.question: How can I get into Dayanand Institute of Pharmacy, Latur for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Dayanand Institute of Pharmacy, Latur has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.Pharma Candidate must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/Biology subjects with above mentioned marks in the above subjects taken together from any recognised Board/Council. The mentioned marks of SC/ST and OBC is for the candidate belonging to maharashtra State. Candidates who are appearing at the qualifying examination are also eligible. Maharashtra State candidates must have to appear for MHTCET. All India Candidates need to appear for MHTCET/NEET. However, preference shall be given to the candidate obtaining non zero positive score in NEET over the candidates who obtained non zero score in MHTCET.
D.Pharma Candidate passed 10+2 (science stream) with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Mathematics or Any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply
A:    Courses offered by Dayanand Institute of Pharmacy, Latur are B.Pharma, D.Pharma. These courses are in the stream of Medicine & Health Sciences.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good teachers.

review_content.Placements: About 70% of students got placed in our batch. The highest salary offered was Rs. 1,07,000 per month. The average salary offered was 60,000 per month. The lowest salary offered was Rs. 40,000 per month. Companies like BSV, TCS, etc., visited our college. Around 34 students got placed in BSV and 29 students in TCS.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college had hostels. They were clean and surrounded by trees.
review_content.Faculty: Students got good results. Teachers were supportive and well-qualified. Some of them had a lot of teaching experience. All courses were relevant and made students industry-ready. We used to study all the chapters and their concept to pass exams easily.

reviews_list.review_title: About 2nd best pharmacy college in Latur.

review_content.Placements: I have been placed in the 2025 batch. There are 120 students from which nearly 10 students get placed in the final year. The highest package is 3.2 LPA, and the lowest salary is 2 LPA. Top roles are offered in the research and development section. I just have to suggest that the pharmacy section shouldn't have industrial visits from time to time. But the college has money for it, that's not fair case pharmacy and medicine are practical subjects, students should know the whole process.
review_content.Infrastructure: Library is okay but Wi-Fi speed is very slow that's not clean. Canteen food is not so good. We have to eat outside of time. Mess is not good for hostel students. We have to arrange the food explicitly from the college. Also, the college campus is not friendly to the girls. But bouncers are available to take care of boys.

review_content.Placements: About 68% of students were placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 6.5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. admission_overview.description: CIS Foundation admission 2025 is primarily merit-based. The college provides a wide range of courses at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. These programmes are offered in the field of Technology, Pharmacy, Nursing, Law, Computer Applications, etc. Students can enrol on the course of choice by satisfying the admission criteria for the same. The application process for CIS Foundation commences online via the official website of the college. Interested students can read the following article to learn all about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and admission procedure for various CIS Foundation programmes.

eligibility_selection.title: CIS Foundation Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2025
eligibility_selection.description: CIS Foundation course admission is done on the basis of preset admission criteria that students must meet to be eligible for the application. The institute offers more than ten courses across several fields, such as Technology, Pharmacy, Nursing, Law, and Computer Applications. Students are shortlisted on a merit basis. Those seeking to join the undergraduate courses offered at the college need to have passed Class 12 from a recognised board. For PG admissions, students must have completed graduation from a recognised university. admission_process.title: CIS Foundation Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: CIS Foundation admissions 2025are merit-based for the UG, PG, and Diploma courses. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The step-wise admission process at CIS Foundation is given below:
STEP 1: Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, atCISFOUNDTION.CO.IN. Aspirants also need to pay an application fee. Candidates can fill out the application form on the college's official website.
STEP 2: Selection
The institute admits students based on merit. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theCIS Foundation's feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

review_content.Placements: Placements are average, but most secure jobs or higher studies. CSE is the best here after NIT Srinagar. IUST collaborates with IIT for internships. review_content.Infrastructure: It's decent and depends on how much you can adjust. Classrooms are spacious with Wi-Fi. The campus is beautiful, surrounded by mountains. There are canteens, cafes, stationery shops, medical facilities, and a well-equipped library. Hostels lack Wi-Fi, wardens are strict, and the mess food is above average.

review_summary.college_name: Islamic University of Science and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Think before you choose, must read this review first.

content.Placements: Placements are good, mainly depending on our skills. More skilled students have chances of getting placed. Almost 60% of students get placed. The highest package is around 9 LPA, and minimum is 1 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Paras Health, Bharat Petroleum, etc. Top roles offered are software engineer and web developed.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure. It has nice buildings but doesn't have digital boards in every class. Our college has good natural environment. A lot of canteens are available on the campus. Food quality is good both veg and non-veg. For sports, you can play cricket, basketball but don't have much indoor sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Review of Islamic University of Science and Technology.

content.Placements: Placements are not that good, but I can say they are average placements. But recently saw a little spike in placements. I don't know about the highest package, but recently, many students from the CS department got placed at good companies. All the students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel and infrastructure are very good. The hostels are new, fully furnished, and the food is also good. Classrooms are nicely furnished. For sports, they have two major grounds. Most importantly, they have a roomy library where students can go and study at any time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Limited exposure requires extra effort and developing over time.

content.Placements: Placements are average, but most secure jobs or higher studies. CSE is the best here after NIT Srinagar. IUST collaborates with IIT for internships. Companies like Amazon, IBM, and Wipro visit. The median package is 5.4 LPA. The highest salary is 7 LPA. One senior secured 65 LPA off-campus in 2024.
content.Infrastructure: It's decent and depends on how much you can adjust. Classrooms are spacious with Wi-Fi. The campus is beautiful, surrounded by mountains. There are canteens, cafes, stationery shops, medical facilities, and a well-equipped library. Hostels lack Wi-Fi, wardens are strict, and the mess food is above average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Food Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The university campus is good.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in this course. This course has a package of rupees 1.5 LPA which is maximum and minimum of Rs 50,000. Nestle, Amul, and Britannia are recruiting companies. Almost 60% of students got internships in companies like Nescafe. Food technologies, quality manager, consumer safety officer, and many more roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has a lot of facilities such as well-equipped labs, good Wi-Fi, spacious classrooms, and library with a lot of good books available. The hostel has good facilities. The food in the mess is good, and canteen is good as well. Medical facilities are also available. A lot of sports can be played here. There are a lot of games that we can play.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Food Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: This is a very good college.

content.Placements: 60% of students in our course are placed in companies like Nestle, Amul, Real, and Tropicana with 26 LPA. The highest package of our course is 26 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Amul, Nestle, Real, etc. Out of 60, 40 students got internships from my course. Food technologies, food research scholars, etc., are the roles offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our department are good. The infrastructure available is good. Wi-Fi is available there and 24X7 labs are very well organised. The library contains all types of books. The food quality in hostel is good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are also good.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission into IUST Awantipora for a Diploma?
faqs.answer: IUST Awantipora Diploma admission is subject to the fulfilment of the preset eligibility and selection criteria. The eligibility criteria for Diploma admission is for the candidates to have passed Class 10 with the minimum required aggregate (35%) and relevant subjects. Such candidates are required to appear for the University Entrance Test to be considered for seat allocation. Hence, getting a direct admission to the Diploma courses of IUST Awantipora may not be possible.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.Tech at IUST?

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BA admission at IUST?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking BA admission at IUST must necessarily meet the course-specific eligibility criteria specified by the university. The eligibility criteria depend on the choice of specialisation. The course-wise eligibility requirements for BA admission at the university are as follows:Candidates seeking admission to a BA in Journalism & Mass Communication must have scored at least 50% in Class 12 from a recognised boardFor all other specialisations, candidates must have scored an aggregate of 45% or more in Class 12 from a recognised boardA relaxation of 5% on the minimum required aggregate is provided to candidates from reserved categories

faqs.question: When can I apply for IUST Awantipora Diploma admission?
faqs.answer: IUST Awantipora Diploma admission is granted to applicants who fulfil the eligibility and selection criteria specified by the university. To be eligible for admission, applicants must have completed Class 10/Class 12 (for Lateral Entry) with the required minimum aggregate. Hence, it can be said that the candidates who have appeared or are appearing for the Class 10/Class 12 exam in the current year can apply for admission. A 'Declaration for Result Awaited Candidates' must be filled by candidates applying before their final results are declared.

reviews.review_heading: Think before you choose, must read this review first.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure. It has nice buildings but doesn't have digital boards in every class. Our college has good natural environment. A lot of canteens are available on the campus. Food quality is good both veg and non-veg. For sports, you can play cricket, basketball but don't have much indoor sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Islamic University of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and infrastructure are very good. The hostels are new, fully furnished, and the food is also good. Classrooms are nicely furnished. For sports, they have two major grounds. Most importantly, they have a roomy library where students can go and study at any time.

reviews.review_heading: Limited exposure requires extra effort and developing over time.
reviews.review_text: It's decent and depends on how much you can adjust. Classrooms are spacious with Wi-Fi. The campus is beautiful, surrounded by mountains. There are canteens, cafes, stationery shops, medical facilities, and a well-equipped library. Hostels lack Wi-Fi, wardens are strict, and the mess food is above average.

reviews.review_heading: The university campus is good.
reviews.review_text: Our department has a lot of facilities such as well-equipped labs, good Wi-Fi, spacious classrooms, and library with a lot of good books available. The hostel has good facilities. The food in the mess is good, and canteen is good as well. Medical facilities are also available. A lot of sports can be played here. There are a lot of games that we can play.

reviews.review_heading: This is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our department are good. The infrastructure available is good. Wi-Fi is available there and 24X7 labs are very well organised. The library contains all types of books. The food quality in hostel is good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good for placements and a good environment for students. It is a value for money.
reviews.review_text: The library is great. The classrooms of some courses are bad, and the washrooms are unclean. Wi-Fi is available 24x7. Labs are amazing and fully equipped with the latest instruments, equipment, and technology, and the staff is highly trained for the same. Students are encouraged to participate in using the equipment and are taught as per requirement.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely unhappy because we are getting a 2nd campus 2 kilometers away from the main campus.
reviews.review_text: Basically, there are 2 buildings in different areas. For any kind of diploma course, students have to travel at least 2 kilometers to their diploma campus. On the main campus, there is good Wi-Fi, classrooms, and a library. The quality of the hostel is very good and clean. It has good and clean food. It has an enjoyable environment.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty. They are good at teaching and provide learning environm
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the university is excellent with the availability of Wi-Fi in classrooms. Library is almost to continuing to lack books which is known as the room library of the Islamic University of Technology. Canteen and medical facilities are also available and are excellent. Sports week is held every month.

reviews.review_heading: IUST is one of the best universities in Kashmir, and our university is well...
reviews.review_text: In IUST, the facilities and infrastructure are also good, and Wi-Fi is available in all the departments. Every facility is present in the hostel as well as the university. The mess is hygienic. Medical facilities are also available in the university, and an ambulance is present.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty and infrastructure are fine; however, the placements are not satisfying.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. The university is young and is growing rapidly. The classrooms are spacious, and the campus is quite huge with fields around. It has a lot of cafeterias and nice, spacious auditoriums; however, there is less scope for sports.

reviews.review_heading: IUST infrastructure is really good, located at a very good place, placements not so good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good. The hostel was good, but the food available was not good. Games were good, medical facilities were good, and sports were very good. They took us to various colleges for different competitions and events. The overall experience with the college was good.

reviews.review_heading: IUST and the academic life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very nice and well built. There are buildings with top facilities and the labs regarding each course are much more advanced. Rumi library is where all sorts of books and journals are available and hostels are also very nice, well maintained and very clean. The food is also very hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: It was a mistake to take admission to this very university that I might regret throughout my life.
reviews.review_text: Good but not great as compared to the fee that you're paying and also, sports facilities are the worst ever. There are no proper indoor or outdoor facilities for the respective games and you can't even complain as they are full of excuses. The rules are hectic, which are not even in IITs and you're forced to follow them; otherwise, you'll get punished.

reviews.review_heading: Review for the Islamic University of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this university is great. Buildings are designed with new technology and have all the facilities that a modern building could have. They are well-furnished and organized very well. Classrooms are neat and clean, having all the facilities and having Wi-Fi too; labs are well-equipped, having all the instruments and chemicals needed; and the library is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in everything but lacks placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a beautiful infrastructure and every possible facility from sports to labs. Our college has high-speed internet, and the labs are equipped with the latest machines, computers, etc. Classrooms have modern equipment like smart boards and speakers. It also has good food.

highlights.summary:
Admissions 2023-24 are open to all the courses. Candidates can apply through the official website.

Established in 2004, CT Polytechnic College is popularly known as CTPC, Jalandhar. It is approved by the All India Council of Technical Education (AICTE) and affiliated to Punjab State Board of Technical Education and Industrial Training, Chandigarh. The institute offers diploma programmes in the field of Engineering. The college has opted for modern learning methodology, lectures, and the associated hand-outs.

The curriculum offered by the college is divided into six semesters including in-house training and one-month industrial training in an organisation relevant to the specialisation opted by its students.

CTPC has eight departments that emphasise on personality development & grooming of the students, namely:

The college also has tie-ups with renowned industry name i.e. HCL Infosystems Ltd, Competent Synergies, Lalit International, Forward Sports Company, Subhash Sales Corpn, GB Tools, Satyam Valves Pvt Ltd, As Metals Pvt Ltd, North India Computers, JCT Limited to provide placements and training to its students.

The college has well-equipped infrastructue including pharmacognosy lab where students get an opportunity to study the morphological and microscopically characters in detail of herbal drugs. The lab consists of compound microscopes, stage micrometers, dissecting microscopes, camera lucid as, eye-piece micrometers and various crude drugs. It also has specially designed workshops in an area of 20,000 sqft. There are eight shops, including Carpentry Shop, Fitting Shop, Sheet Metal Shop, Machine Shop, Wielding Shop, Smithy Shop, Foundry Shop, Electronic & Electrical Shop.

CT Polytechnic College Jalandhar admission is conducted online. Candidates seeking admission to all diploma programmes offered by the college can apply on its official website of the college.

The college offers seven diploma programmes for a duration of three years. The curricular of diploma programmes in Engineering consists of courses in Applied Sciences, Basic courses in Engineering and interdisciplinary courses in Engineering & Technology. The courses under Applied Sciences comprises of English and Communication skills, Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry. individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, helpful teachers, tough exams, and good placement opportunities.

content.Placements: Unfortunately, no one from my batch got placed since most of us failed the last exam. The average starting package in my college is around 2 LPA. A few students managed to secure internships, but most of us are still looking for jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is impressive, with beautiful buildings and Wi-Fi available throughout the campus. I chose not to stay in the hostel due to its high cost so I don't have any information about those facilities. Yet, I believe the sports and games facilities are excellent, especially since I was part of my college team.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The College is very good.

content.Placements: The placement of our college is great. If you are a good student, your job is guaranteed. The college has organized various placement drives since last year. Our seniors are very helpful. The highest package in our course was around 5 LPA. But the final thing depends on the student.
content.Infrastructure: Great infrastructure. The Wi-Fi facility is limited, but it has very good speed. Classrooms are very big and equipped with AC in our department. The labs have all the required equipment. The library is also good and easily accessible. The food quality of the hostel is very good.

individual_reviews.title: Our college has a really good infrastructure and a good crowd.

AGI Infrastructure is the top recruiting company for our course. Only those students who passed in every semester got internships in good companies. Junior engineer is the top role offered in our course, and it is also helpful for the future.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good facilities, good infrastructure, good Wi-Fi facility and a good library, where all books are available. There are also good labs for practical experiments, and the hostel is also good. Good food is available in the mess, and its quality is also quite good. Medical facilities are good, and there is also a gym in the hostel. All kinds of sports tournament are held here.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: According to my view, it is one of the best college in Punjab region.

content.Placements: Our university has a campus placement in comparison to other universities. Most of the companies visit the campus. Most of the students faced an interview in these companies and placed in it. Some companies are fraud. Sometimes, the students faced an interview and get campus placement, but joining letter is not offered to the students.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus is big. The infrastructure has such a fabulous look. It has a big playground. There is an auditorium in our college. Boys and girls hostel is also available in this college. There are more than 50,000 students in this college. Most of the students are from other countries.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: A path which not only made me strong academically but also made me a better human being.

content.Placements: The placement of our batch students was too good. Approximately 68% of the students were placed from our batch and the highest salary package for our batch was 3.5 lakhs per annum. The companies that visited our college was Infosys, TCS, L&T and many more. The internship is compulsory for all the students in our college so all of them got an internship.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, all facilities are available like Wi-Fi (for information websites only), machine labs, electronics lab, PLC labs, CSE labs and many more for other branches. Medical facilities are also available for emergency and the doctor is also very good. Sports is promoted by my college and it also organizes half marathon every year to support and promote sports.Outdoor games facilities are available. The quality of our classes and labs are average, everything is available in our classes and labs but the condition of equipment like switch boards, training kits etc. was not good. The quality of food in the canteen was good but 80% of the students preferred to bring food from home. Actually, I don't know too much about the hostel rooms. I didn't face any infrastructure related issues during my tenure at the college.

review_summary.college_name: Teegala Krishna Reddy College Of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Nice college to take admission in.

content.Placements: Nearly 109 people were in my class. Companies like ITC are recruiting people from our college. Nearly 50 students will get internships, and some of them will get in the ITAC. Many roles, such as manager, employer, and primarily a producer of chemicals, etc. are offered.
content.Infrastructure: The college has all the desired facilities  and is known as TKRCOP. Classrooms were neat and clean, and there will be free Wi-Fi for the teachers and faculty. There are no books in the library, so it will be a quiet place to study. Sports like cricket will be conducted every Saturday.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure, and the college is full of students.

content.Placements: The placement in Teegala Krishna Reddy College of Pharmacy is good, and many companies like Cipla, Dr. Reddy's, etc., and many other pharma companies are offering good placements in their companies. The average package is from 1,50,000 to 2,50,000 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The classes are very good, and the infrastructure of the college is very nice. I personally like the college infrastructure and the nature of the college. The college provides a Wi-Fi connection for the students and the staff of Teegala Krishna Reddy College of Pharmacy.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and good placements, and lots of enjoyment.

content.Placements: The college provides good job opportunities. The packages are up to 4 lacs per annum. Companies approach us for internships. We can also write drug inspector exams and several other exams.
content.Infrastructure: The food and environment are good. The food facilities are better than any other college. We can join the college gym as well. Sports are also available in the college. A coach is available to train us. Sports meets are held in the college.
content.Faculty: The best faculty are available, and there is a library to study. They help you pick good books which are useful. Semester exams are difficult. If we study well, exams are easy. The best faculty are available to teach us.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I'm 50% satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Placements are very rare in any college. Students make up 70%. Teachers say so very well in teaching. The highest package is 5L for our senior and the lowest package is 1.20L per annum. Their are some roles are pharmacovigilance and QA, QC. And other some small roles.
content.Infrastructure: Lab facilities are also very good. But their are no extra activities like games and other etc. Their is best library also present in our college. Hostel facility was good but food quality is not good as much you think. Sports also their but only for B.Tech students.
